data.title: Foseco India Limited Announces Key Management and Auditor Changes
data.description:
Foseco India Limited ( (IN:FOSECOIND) ) has shared an announcement.

Foseco India Limited announced several key changes following its Board Meeting on April 4, 2025. The company has appointed J B Bhave & Co. as the new Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term, replacing Rajesh Karunakaran & Co. Additionally, Vineet Thakar, the Sales, Marketing & Technology Director, has resigned, and Amit Kumar has been appointed as the new Commercial Director effective April 7, 2025. These changes reflect a strategic shift in the company’s management and governance structure, potentially impacting its operational focus and stakeholder relations.

More about Foseco India Limited

data.title: DuPont Under Investigation by Chinese Market Regulator
data.description:
DuPont de Nemours ( (DD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

DuPont is cooperating with an investigation by the State Administration for Market Regulation of China concerning its Tyvek® business. In 2024, Tyvek® sales to China were approximately $90 million, representing less than 1% of DuPont’s total net sales, indicating limited financial impact on the company.

More about DuPont de Nemours

DuPont de Nemours, Inc. operates in the chemical industry, focusing on products such as Tyvek®, which is used in various applications including construction and protective apparel.

data.title: Knights Group Holdings Completes Acquisition of IBB Law LLP
data.description:
An update from Knights Group Holdings Plc ( (GB:KGH) ) is now available.

Knights Group Holdings PLC has completed the acquisition of IBB Law LLP, a full-service regional law firm with offices in Ascot, Beaconsfield, Reading, and Uxbridge. This acquisition aligns with Knights’ strategy to enhance its organic growth through selective acquisitions, adding 140 professionals and a national client base. The integration of IBB Law LLP will expand Knights’ expertise in franchising, education, and residential development, strengthening its presence in the South East and providing new clients access to Knights’ broader range of services.

More about Knights Group Holdings Plc

Knights Group Holdings PLC is a fast-growing legal and professional services business, ranked among the UK’s top 50 largest law firms by revenue. The company was one of the first in the UK to transition from a traditional partnership model to a corporate structure in 2012, leading to rapid growth. Knights specializes in Corporate and Commercial law and Private Wealth services, focusing on key UK markets outside London, and operates from 30 offices across the country.

data.title: Bullion Gold Secures Bousquet Property Deal and Closes Financing
data.description:
Bullion Gold Resources ( (TSE:BGD) ) has shared an update.

Bullion Gold Resources Corp. has completed an option agreement with Olympio Metals Limited for the Bousquet property, allowing Olympio to earn up to an 80% interest by investing $2 million in exploration and making cash and share payments. Bullion Gold will retain a 20% interest and has secured financing through a private placement, raising approximately $200,000, which will support its ongoing operations and strategic initiatives.

More about Bullion Gold Resources

Bullion Gold Resources Corp. is engaged in the identification, exploration, and development of viable mineral properties in Quebec, with a focus on the Bodo SM project.

data.title: Baytex Energy Announces Virtual Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description:
Baytex Energy ( (TSE:BTE) ) has provided an announcement.

Baytex Energy Corp. has announced its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for May 5, 2025. The meeting will be held virtually, allowing shareholders to participate online. Key agenda items include reviewing financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2024, electing ten directors, appointing auditors, and considering resolutions related to executive compensation and share awards. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it addresses critical governance and financial matters impacting the company’s future operations.

More about Baytex Energy

Baytex Energy Corp. is a company operating in the energy sector, primarily focused on oil and gas exploration and production. The company is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, and it is known for its involvement in the North American energy markets.

data.title: Petrofac CFO Acquires Shares Under Deferred Bonus Plan
data.description:
Petrofac ( (GB:PFC) ) has shared an update.

Petrofac Limited announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Afonso Reis e Sousa, has acquired 11,215 ordinary shares at no cost following the vesting of shares awarded under the Petrofac Deferred Bonus Plan. This transaction reflects the company’s adherence to regulatory requirements and highlights its commitment to aligning managerial interests with shareholder value. The sale of a portion of these shares was conducted to cover tax liabilities, maintaining transparency in financial dealings.

More about Petrofac

Petrofac Limited is a company operating in the oilfield services industry, providing engineering, procurement, construction, and project management services to the oil and gas sector. The company focuses on delivering solutions to enhance the efficiency and sustainability of energy production and infrastructure.

data.title: Starcore Unveils Promising Geophysical Survey Results at Kimoukro Gold Project
data.description:
The latest update is out from Starcore International Mine ( (TSE:SAM) ).

Starcore International Mines Ltd. has announced the results of a geophysical survey conducted at its Kimoukro gold project in the Ivory Coast. The survey, which included Induced Polarisation, Resistivity, and ground Magnetic methods, identified multiple moderate-to-strong chargeability anomalies that will guide future drilling targets. The findings highlight significant structural features and potential mineralized zones, which could enhance Starcore’s exploration efforts and strengthen its position in the gold mining sector.

More about Starcore International Mine

Starcore International Mines Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is engaged in identifying and developing mineral resources, with a particular emphasis on projects in strategic locations such as the Ivory Coast.

data.title: Schroder BSC Social Impact Trust Repurchases Shares to Adjust Capital Structure
data.description:
Schroder BSC Social Impact Trust Plc ( (GB:SBSI) ) just unveiled an update.

Schroder BSC Social Impact Trust Plc has repurchased 200,000 of its ordinary shares at 67.18 pence per share to hold in treasury, impacting its share capital and voting rights. This move could influence shareholder calculations under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules, potentially affecting their interest notifications.

More about Schroder BSC Social Impact Trust Plc

Schroder BSC Social Impact Trust Plc operates in the financial sector, focusing on social impact investments. The company primarily engages in managing and investing in projects that generate positive social outcomes alongside financial returns.
